auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Document360 API token passed in the api_token header. Create it in your Document360 knowledge base portal under API tokens.

actions.name: get_workspace_categories
actions.description: Get the Document360 category hierarchy for a workspace.

projectVersionId.description: The Document360 project version or workspace ID. Fetch it with list_workspaces.

excludeArticles.description: Whether Document360 should omit articles from category nodes.

langCode.description: The Document360 language code such as en, fr, de-DE, or pt-BR.

includeCategoryDescription.description: Whether Document360 should include category descriptions in the response.

securityVisibility.description: Document360 protection level filter where 0 means public and 1 means private or protected.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting Document360 workspace categories.

success.description: Whether Document360 reported the operation as successful.

anyOf.description: The notification description returned by Document360.
The notification error code returned by Document360.

raw.description: The raw notification object returned by Document360.

items.description: A notification item returned by Document360.

items.description: A notification item returned by Document360.

information.description: The informational messages returned by Document360.

meta.description: The normalized Document360 response envelope metadata.

actions.name: list_workspace_articles
actions.description: List articles in a Document360 workspace with optional language and pagination filters.

projectVersionId.description: The Document360 project version or workspace ID. Fetch it with list_workspaces.

langCode.description: The Document360 language code such as en, fr, de-DE, or pt-BR.

page.description: The 0-based page index used by Document360 paginated endpoints.

hitsPerPage.description: The number of articles per page. Use 0 to let Document360 return all articles, capped by the API.

securityVisibility.description: Document360 protection level filter where 0 means public and 1 means private or protected.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Document360 workspace articles.

success.description: Whether Document360 reported the operation as successful.

anyOf.description: The notification description returned by Document360.
The notification error code returned by Document360.

raw.description: The raw notification object returned by Document360.

raw.description: The raw Document360 response envelope.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Document360 articles.

actions.name: search_workspace
actions.description: Search for a phrase inside a Document360 workspace.

projectVersionId.description: The Document360 project version or workspace ID. Fetch it with list_workspaces.

langCode.description: The Document360 language code such as en, fr, de-DE, or pt-BR.

searchQuery.description: The phrase to search across articles in the workspace.

page.description: The 0-based page index used by Document360 paginated endpoints.

hitsPerPage.description: The number of search results per page. Document360 accepts values from 0 through 1000.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching inside a Document360 workspace.

success.description: Whether Document360 reported the operation as successful.

anyOf.description: The notification description returned by Document360.
The notification error code returned by Document360.

raw.description: The raw notification object returned by Document360.

items.description: A notification item returned by Document360.

The notification error code returned by Document360.

items.description: A notification item returned by Document360.

information.description: The informational messages returned by Document360.

meta.description: The normalized Document360 response envelope metadata.

anyOf.description: The matched article ID returned by Document360.
The matched category ID returned by Document360.
The matched title returned by Document360.
The matched content returned by Document360.

The snippet match level returned by Document360.
A normalized Document360 search snippet field.

The search object ID returned by Document360.

raw.description: The raw search hit returned by Document360.

items.description: A normalized Document360 search hit.

hits.description: The search hits returned by Document360.

anyOf.description: The total hit count returned by Document360.
The result page returned by Document360.
The total page count returned by Document360.
The page size returned by Document360.
The search processing time in milliseconds returned by Document360.
The normalized search query returned by Document360.

raw.description: The raw Document360 response envelope.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when searching a Document360 workspace.
